title: fissistigma rugosum
intro: Fissistigma rugosum, also known as the Chinese quinine tree or Chinese cinchona, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that is widely used for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimalarial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues, including fever, malaria, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Fissistigma rugosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Fissistigma rugosum can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
